title: koeleria ciliata var. pyramidata
intro: Koeleria ciliata var. pyramidata, also known as Pyramidal Koeleria or Koeler's hair-grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Koeleria ciliata var. pyramidata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Koeleria ciliata var. pyramidata is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or a topical ointment, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
